ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current season */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the performance belongs to */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "t" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "gf" INTEGER /* Goals for */,
  "ga" INTEGER /* Goals against */,
  "diff" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "gf_pct" REAL /* Goals for percentage */,
  "last_10" TEXT /* Last 10 games record */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current streak */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored on power plays */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored while short-handed */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Player's handedness (left or right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the performance belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the roster belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's term on the roster */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's term on the roster */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the trade */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_details" TEXT /* Details of the trade (e.g., other players involved, conditions) */,
  "trade_value" INTEGER /* Value of the trade in terms of draft picks or other assets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the data belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins */,
  "power_play_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of power play opportunities */,
  "short_handed_opportunities" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed opportunities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Time on ice during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the standing belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the standings */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "t" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Total points */,
  "win_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "gf" INTEGER /* Goals for */,
  "ga" INTEGER /* Goals against */,
  "diff" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "gf_pct" REAL /* Goals for percentage */,
  "power_play_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of power play goals */,
  "penalty_killing_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of successful penalty kills */,
  "faceoff_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of faceoff wins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., team performance, player performance) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
